git_write: Git operations that modify the working tree or index
package_run: Run package scripts (npm run, npx, just)
lang_exec: Execute code via language runtimes (python, node)
container_destructive: Destructive container operations (docker rm, docker system prune)
sql_write: Write operations on databases (DROP, DELETE, ALTER)
unknown: Unrecognized command — not in any classify table
